title: cajanus indicus var. bicolor
intro: Cajanus indicus var. bicolor, also known as the bipartite or bicolor pigeon pea, is a variant of the common pigeon pea plant, a legume native to the Indian subcontinent. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antioxidant, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming cajanus indicus var. bicolor include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, manage diabetes, and provide essential nutrients like protein, fiber, and minerals. Cajanus indicus var. bicolor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine formulations.
